meta.notes: All internal speed values (MSpeed) are 2x displayed knot values. Divide by 2 for display.

speedSystem.overview: Ships have 3 forward speed modes plus reverse. Internal speed values are 2x the displayed knot values.

stop.description: No movement. Ship can still turn with axis controls.

combat.description: Second speed. More sails deployed. Standard combat speed.

full.description: Third speed / full sails. All sails deployed. Enables cruise speed ramp-up.

speedFormula.example: Ship with BasicSpeed 9.0 internal = 4.5 knt displayed

speedSystem.minimumSpeedNote: Speed is clamped to minimum 3.0 internal (1.5 knt) even with penalties

cruiseSpeed.overview: When at full sails (speed mode 3), going straight, and at max speed, ships gain bonus 'cruise' (marching) speed over time.

variables.sailMarchingBonus: PMarchingSpeed bonus from equipped sails (e.g. Triangular Sails give +20%)
variables.Speed: Ship's current total speed (internal value, 2x display knt)

notes: Faster ships get LESS cruise bonus (the formula penalizes high base speed)
A ship with 15 internal speed (7.5 knt) gets: 7 * 1 * (2 - 1) = 7.0 cruise bonus
A ship with 9 internal speed (4.5 knt) gets: 7 * 1 * (2 - 0.88) = 7.84 cruise bonus
Ships with Speed >= 65 internal get zero cruise bonus (Speed+35)/50 >= 2

windBonus.description: Additional cruise speed bonus when sailing with favorable wind (WindingDot near 0.9). Requires wind alignment.

conditions: Must be going straight (AxisStateCode == 0, no turning)
Must be at or near max speed (NowSpeed >= PrevMaxSpeed - 0.3)

lowHpDebuff.description: Ships below 25% HP get up to 33% cruise ramp penalty

rampUp.minimumCruise: When at full sails, cruise speed is always at least 2.5 internal

whenNotFullSails.description: Cruise speed drops at rate 7.0/0.95 ≈ 7.37 per second when not at full sails

whenTurning.description: Turning while at full sails causes cruise speed loss. Higher mobility = MORE loss (ships turn more sharply).

whenDamaged.description: Taking damage directly reduces cruise speed accumulation

displayFactor.description: The displayed max cruise includes sail damage and cargo weight penalties

holdCapacity.overview: Cargo weight affects ship speed through a capacity speed factor.

formula.description: Speed multiplier based on cargo load percentage

under50percent.description: BONUS speed when under 50% loaded. Lighter = faster.

over100percent.description: CUBIC penalty for overweight. Gets very harsh quickly.

formula.at250percent: Speed factor = 0 (ship cannot move at 250%+ load)
formula.raftException: Ship ID 1 (raft/rowboat) always has capacity factor = 1.0

sailSpeedFactor.description: Sail damage reduces speed. FirstSailHP is weighted average of all sail hitbox health values.
sailSpeedFactor.weightedAverage: Sum of (sailHP[i] * sailWeight[i]) for each sail section

mobilityPenalty.description: Below 95% sail HP, mobility drops. At 80% sail HP, mobility is 80% of normal.

windEffectivity.description: How much wind helps/hinders. WindingDot is dot product of ship heading with wind direction.
windEffectivity.range: 0 (sailing directly into wind) to 1 (sailing with wind)

windCourseChange.description: Wind pushes your heading. Stronger effect when sailing against wind. Disabled by BDisableWindCourseChange (Sailing Master crew).
windCourseChange.paddleShipsExempt: Ships with paddles or steam wheels are not affected by strong wind turning

backwindPenalty.description: When sailing against wind, there's a minimum speed based on ship speed / 3

stormBonus.description: Storms add bonus speed from wind effects and being near map edges

windEffects.riverEffect: Rivers provide minimum 50% wind effectivity even when sailing against wind

uniqueWindRose.description: Ships with HasUniqueWindRose use modified wind calculation with 0.94 blend factor. At WindingDot > 0.95, effectivity drops (can't sail directly downwind efficiently).

paddlesAndSteam.overview: Ships with paddles or steam wheels can supplement sail speed.

paddleSpeed.formula: paddleMaxSpeed = min(shipSpeed * capacityFactor, PatSpeed + 1) * speedModeFactor * min(1, capacityFactor * 1.1) * crewEfficiency + PaddleSpeedExtraBonus
paddleSpeed.speedModeFactor: 0.7 at slow speed (mode 1), 1.0 at other speeds
paddleSpeed.description: Paddles only kick in when wind-driven speed is insufficient. Limited by crew efficiency.

steamWheel.description: Steam wheels work like paddles but require coal. Can be toggled on/off.
steamWheel.coalUsage: Uses coal on a 1-second timer loop when active

cannonSpeedFactor.overview: Each cannon type has a SpeedFactor that affects cannonball projectile speed.

values.0.8: Slow projectiles: Cast Iron Howitzer, Iron Howitzer types, Heavy Howitzer, Swivel Gun
values.1.0: Standard: Most base cannons, Bronze types, Mortars
values.1.25: Fast projectiles: Long Barrel types, Culverin types, Demi-Culverin

cannonSpeedFactor.note: This multiplies the base projectile speed. Combined with PCannonBallsSpeed bonus.

damageFormula.description: Damage is applied through the MakeDamage system with multiple components
damageFormula.healthDamage: Direct HP damage, reduced by PReduceDamage bonus (max 99%)
damageFormula.sailDamage: Distributed across all sails (TotalSailDamage) or specific sail (SingleSailDamage)
damageFormula.educationMapBonus: Players take 1/1.5 = 67% damage in education maps. PvP damage in education = 1.2x

cannonDamage.lowHpDamageBonus: PDamageCannonIfStrengthBelow30P activates below 50% HP (despite name saying 30%)

reloadMechanics.mendingPenalty: Reloading speed is 15% while mending, 0% while shooting or boarding

criticalEffects.corpusCritical: Creates a 'big hole' that reduces speed to 30% for UCritCorpusTimeSec seconds
criticalEffects.burningCritical: Starts a fire on the ship. Different PredefinedBurningTypes.
criticalEffects.speedDebuff: Temporary speed reduction from sail hits

collisionDamage.corpusCritChance: Collisions can cause corpus critical (10 second big hole)
collisionDamage.fireOnCollision: Some collisions can start fires (InfiniteAllowMening type)
collisionDamage.destroyFlooding: BDestroyFloodingShopByCollision upgrade allows destroying sinking ships by ramming

armorSystem.description: Armor reduces damage. Higher armor = less damage taken from cannonballs.
armorSystem.noseProtection: PReduceDamageToNose — specific protection for bow hits

bigFire.description: Big fires cause continuous damage and must be actively fought

microfire.description: Small fires on specific ship areas. Auto-extinguish over time.

boarding.overview: Boarding is a crew combat minigame when two ships are close enough.

requirements.targetHP: Target must be below 50% HP (for player targets)
requirements.alignment: Ships must be roughly parallel (dot products > 0.8)
requirements.noFire: Neither ship can have active big fire

unitInProtection.damageIn: Units in protection take only 20% damage
unitInProtection.damageOut: Units in protection deal only 20% damage

crewProtection.boardingCrewProtection: PBoardingCrewProtectionCballs — boarding crew resist cannonball damage
crewProtection.sailingCrewProtection: PSailorsCrewProtectionCballs — sailor crew resist cannonball damage

rewards.noTargetStart: BBoardingStartsWithNoTarget — board without selecting target first
rewards.musketeersDefence: BBoardingStartsMusketeersDefence — start boarding with musketeer defense active

efficiency.description: Crew efficiency affects reload speed, paddle speed, and sail handling

factions.Military: Combats in game data. Focused on combat bonuses. Conflicts with Pirates.
factions.Pirates: Boarding, looting, visibility bonuses. Conflicts with Military.
factions.Adventurers: Exploration, XP, special crew finding bonuses.

crewSystem.specialCrewSlots: Up to 4 special crew (3 base + potential skill bonus)

mending.description: Repair while at sea. Activated by player, runs on 900ms timer.
mending.speedRestriction: Must be at speed 0 or 1 (or speed 2 with BRepairAllowOnSpeed2 crew)
mending.reloadPenalty: While mending, weapon reload is only 15% speed

sailRepair.distribution: Repair is distributed across all damaged sails inversely proportional to their weight

repairSystem.unitHealing: BHealUnitsWhenMending — heal random units during mending

shallowWater.description: Shallow water penalty based on ship rank and position
shallowWater.lookAhead: Checks 50 units ahead to see if shallows increase (slows before grounding)
shallowWater.worldmapOnly: Only applies on worldmap, not in port or education

flooding.stoppedByExplosions: Powder kegs, mortars, stern damage, and fireworks stop flooding
flooding.collisionReduces: Collisions reduce flooding by damage/maxHP ratio

destructionTilt.condition: Rain > 0.5 AND not destroyed/flooding AND not education AND |pitch| > 0.25 AND rang > 5
destructionTilt.rampUp: Increases at rate 1/8 per second, scaled by speed ratio
destructionTilt.rampDown: Decreases at rate 1/8 per second, faster when slow
destructionTilt.description: In storms, ships can tilt and potentially capsize

visibility.invisibility: PInvisibility — makes ship harder to spot
visibility.makeCrewInvisible: MMakeInvisiblePlaces — hides crew count from other players

economyEffects.protectCrewLooting: BCrewWillntDeadInSea — crew don't die when looting at sea

specialAbilities.changeBallsSpeed: ChangeCBallsBonus from PChangeCBallsSpeed — faster ammo switching per sailor

npcSystem.overview: NPCs are procedurally generated based on region level, ship pool, and type-specific modifiers. Named bosses have fixed stats.

statGeneration.description: Regular NPC stats derived from base ship stats with random variation
statGeneration.armor: Ship base armor + random lerp between worst and best upgrade values (minus 0.3). Elite ships get -0.5.
statGeneration.speed: Ship base speed - (1 - regionFactor) + destroyer bonus × 1.5 + random upgrade lerp. Region 5-6 get +0.07-0.15 bonus.
statGeneration.hp: Ship base HP × (0.7 + 0.3 × regionFactor + 0.2 × destroyerBonus - heavy ship penalty) + random upgrade lerp. Region 0: ×0.85, Region 1: ×0.9.
statGeneration.damage: Cannon penetration × side port count × 0.9 × (0.5 + 0.5 × regionFactor + region bonus). Region 0: ×0.85.
statGeneration.mobility: Ship base mobility + random upgrade lerp.
statGeneration.attackDistance: Cannon max distance × lerp(0.8, 1.0, regionFactor) + bonus for short-range cannons.
statGeneration.regionFactor: min(regionLevel / 7, 1.0) — scales stats from weak (region 0) to full power (region 7+)

crewFormula.formula: max(500, HP) / 50, capped at 40 + (excess-40)/2, then +3 + hash_bonus, then × multiplier × 4

rewardCalculation.description: XP and gold rewards based on NPC combat power
rewardCalculation.goldFormula: base(75 or 150 for traders) + locationMultiplier × (combatBonus + damageBonus) × GameSpeed × 0.792

captureRules.arenaException: No captures allowed in arena maps

typeBehaviors.pirateFr2Fitting: Order of the New Ark ships get -2 speed, +2 armor (slower but tougher)
typeBehaviors.northRegionBonus: Pirates in north regions: HP ×1.2, damage ×1.1
typeBehaviors.destroyerBonus: Destroyers and Mortars get bonus speed and damage scaling
